Terms of Service

Last updated: April 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By using the Tillerstead LLC website (tillerstead.com) or engaging our services, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use our website or services.

2. Services

Tillerstead LLC provides home improvement contracting services in the state of New Jersey, specializing in tile and stone installation, bathroom remodeling, flooring, and backsplash installation. All work is performed under NJ Home Improvement Contractor license #13VH10808800.

3. Estimates & Proposals

  • Estimates provided through our website or in person are approximate and subject to final scope confirmation.
  • A formal contract is required before any work begins. No work commences without a signed agreement.
  • Prices are subject to change based on material costs, site conditions discovered during demolition, and scope modifications agreed upon by both parties.

4. Website Content

The content on this website — including guides, build phase documentation, and tool descriptions — is provided for educational and informational purposes only. It does not constitute:

  • Professional advice (legal, engineering, or architectural)
  • DIY instructions or step-by-step installation guides
  • A warranty or guarantee of specific outcomes

Always consult licensed professionals and your local building code official for project-specific requirements.

5. Intellectual Property

All content, designs, and materials on this website are the property of Tillerstead LLC. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without written permission. Linking to our public guides is permitted and encouraged.

6. Limitation of Liability

Tillerstead LLC is not liable for any damages arising from the use of information on this website. Our liability for contracting services is limited to the terms specified in the executed contract for each project.

7. Dispute Resolution

Any disputes arising from these terms or our services shall be resolved under the laws of the State of New Jersey. Consumers may also contact the New Jersey Division of Consumer Affairs for mediation of home improvement disputes.

8. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to update these terms. Changes will be posted on this page with a revised date. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance.

9. Contact

For questions about these terms:

Tillerstead LLC
325 East Jimmie Leeds Road, Suite 7-333
Galloway Township, NJ 08205
legal@tillerstead.com
